BackstoryDef.title: Power Plant Technician
BackstoryDef.description: Maintained the city’s reactors and generators, keeping the lights on during blackouts and air raids. Skilled in electrical repairs and crisis management.

BackstoryDef.title: Theater Performer
BackstoryDef.description: Acted in patriotic plays and operas, entertaining citizens and soldiers alike. Developed a flair for drama and a talent for inspiring hope in dark times.

BackstoryDef.title: Street Mechanic
BackstoryDef.description: Repaired bicycles, scooters, and delivery trucks for neighbors and local businesses. Learned resourcefulness and the art of improvisation with limited parts.

BackstoryDef.title: Public Bath Attendant
BackstoryDef.description: Kept the city’s public baths clean and welcoming, offering comfort and community in troubled times. Learned the value of hygiene and friendly conversation.

BackstoryDef.title: Street Musician
BackstoryDef.description: Played patriotic songs and folk tunes in city squares, lifting spirits and spreading hope. Developed musical talent and a strong sense of community.

BackstoryDef.title: Tram Operator
BackstoryDef.description: Operated city trams, transporting workers and families through busy streets and blackout drills. Learned punctuality, patience, and the importance of keeping the city moving.

BackstoryDef.title: City Librarian
BackstoryDef.description: Managed a local library, helping citizens find information and escape into stories. Developed a love for learning and a talent for organization.

BackstoryDef.title: Neighborhood Tailor
BackstoryDef.description: Sewed and mended clothes for neighbors and local shops, making do with limited materials. Developed creativity and skill in handiwork.

BackstoryDef.title: Bookstore Clerk
BackstoryDef.description: Worked at a city bookstore, recommending novels and educational texts to customers. Developed strong communication skills and a love for literature.

BackstoryDef.title: Museum Guide
BackstoryDef.description: Led tours at the city museum, sharing stories of history and culture with visitors. Developed public speaking skills and a passion for education.

BackstoryDef.title: Postal Worker
BackstoryDef.description: Delivered letters and packages across the city, braving air raids and blackouts. Learned the value of perseverance and community connection.

BackstoryDef.title: Street Sweeper
BackstoryDef.description: Kept city streets clean and clear, even during air raid debris and ration shortages. Developed a strong work ethic and pride in public service.

BackstoryDef.title: Textile Worker
BackstoryDef.description: Produced uniforms and blankets for soldiers and civilians, working long hours at the loom. Learned patience, precision, and the importance of teamwork.

BackstoryDef.title: News Reporter
BackstoryDef.description: Reported on local events and war news, spreading Party-approved stories and keeping citizens informed. Skilled in writing, interviewing, and public speaking.

BackstoryDef.title: Restaurant Cook
BackstoryDef.description: Prepared meals for hungry workers and soldiers, making the most of rationed ingredients. Developed creativity in the kitchen and a reputation for hearty, comforting food.

BackstoryDef.title: State Hospital Nurse
BackstoryDef.description: Cared for wounded civilians and soldiers in crowded hospitals, working long shifts during air raids. Skilled in first aid, compassion, and crisis management.

BackstoryDef.title: State Schoolchild
BackstoryDef.description: Grew up attending state-run schools, learning Party slogans and practicing air raid drills. Quick to memorize lessons and eager to please teachers.

BackstoryDef.title: Apartment Caretaker
BackstoryDef.description: Maintained communal housing blocks, fixing leaks and keeping the lights on during blackouts. Learned practical skills and the art of neighborly cooperation.

BackstoryDef.title: Local Party Official
BackstoryDef.description: Oversaw neighborhood meetings and enforced Party policies. Skilled in persuasion, organization, and keeping the community loyal to the state.

BackstoryDef.title: City Gardener
BackstoryDef.description: Tended public parks and rooftop gardens, growing food and flowers for the community. Developed patience, a green thumb, and pride in beautifying the city.

BackstoryDef.title: Collective Farm Worker
BackstoryDef.description: Tended rice paddies and vegetable fields for the collective, working long hours to feed the nation and the army. Learned resilience and the value of cooperation.

BackstoryDef.title: Street Vendor
BackstoryDef.description: Sold steamed buns and tea in the bustling city streets, trading news and rumors with customers and soldiers. Developed a sharp wit and a knack for negotiation.

BackstoryDef.title: Utility Worker
BackstoryDef.description: Maintained power lines and water pipes in the city, keeping essential services running during air raids and blackouts. Skilled in repairs and crisis management.

BackstoryDef.title: State Entertainer
BackstoryDef.description: Performed patriotic songs and operas for citizens and soldiers, boosting morale and spreading Party messages. Talented in music and public speaking.

BackstoryDef.title: Black Market Trader
BackstoryDef.description: Operated in the shadows, trading rationed goods and forbidden items. Learned caution, secrecy, and the art of making deals under the watchful eyes of the state.

BackstoryDef.title: PLA Munitions Factory Worker
BackstoryDef.description: Worked long shifts assembling rifles and power cells for the war effort. Learned discipline, efficiency, and the importance of loyalty to the state.

BackstoryDef.title: Propaganda Artist
BackstoryDef.description: Created stirring posters and patriotic murals, inspiring citizens to support the war and fear the American invaders. Talented in art and persuasion.

BackstoryDef.title: State Hospital Doctor
BackstoryDef.description: Practiced medicine in a crowded city hospital, treating wounds and radiation sickness. Dedicated to public health and the Party’s ideals.

BackstoryDef.title: State School Teacher
BackstoryDef.description: Taught children about science, history, and the virtues of the People’s Republic. Led air raid drills and encouraged vigilance against foreign spies.

BackstoryDef.title: State Engineer
BackstoryDef.description: Designed and maintained infrastructure for the war effort, from power plants to bunkers. Analytical and inventive, loyal to the Party’s vision.

BackstoryDef.title: State Radio Host
BackstoryDef.description: Broadcast patriotic news and war bulletins, keeping citizens informed and motivated. Skilled in public speaking and propaganda.

BackstoryDef.title: State Police Officer
BackstoryDef.description: Patrolled city streets, enforcing order and rooting out dissent. Trained in investigation, negotiation, and self-defense.

BackstoryDef.title: State Homemaker
BackstoryDef.description: Managed a household, raised children, and kept the family safe during air raids. Skilled in cooking, cleaning, and rationing supplies.

BackstoryDef.title: State University Student
BackstoryDef.description: Attended university, studying engineering or medicine to serve the Republic. Quick to learn, but inexperienced in the realities of war.

BackstoryDef.title: Market Vendor
BackstoryDef.description: Sold food and supplies in the city market, bartering with neighbors and soldiers alike. Developed strong communication skills and a knack for persuasion.

BackstoryDef.title: Forward Observer
BackstoryDef.description: Directed artillery and air strikes from the front lines, relaying coordinates under fire. Trained in reconnaissance, radio operation, and survival in hostile territory.

BackstoryDef.title: Combat Cook
BackstoryDef.description: Prepared hot meals for troops in the field, often under bombardment. Learned to improvise with rations and keep morale high with a warm bowl of soup.

BackstoryDef.title: Psychological Warfare Operative
BackstoryDef.description: Spread propaganda and misinformation to demoralize enemy troops and sway civilians. Skilled in persuasion, deception, and psychological tactics.

BackstoryDef.title: Field Engineer
BackstoryDef.description: Repaired vehicles, weapons, and communications equipment on the battlefield. Adapted quickly to changing conditions and resource shortages.

BackstoryDef.title: Battlefield Medic
BackstoryDef.description: Rushed into danger to treat wounded soldiers under fire, often improvising with limited supplies. Trained in trauma care and evacuation procedures.

BackstoryDef.title: Sino-American War Artillery Crew
BackstoryDef.description: Operated heavy artillery batteries, bombarding enemy positions from afar. Skilled in teamwork, calculation, and surviving counter-battery fire in the war’s fiercest battles.

BackstoryDef.title: Anti-Power Armor Specialist
BackstoryDef.description: Trained to counter American T-51b power armor units, using specialized weapons and tactics. Experienced in urban ambushes and sabotage missions.

BackstoryDef.title: Chemical Warfare Trooper
BackstoryDef.description: Deployed chemical agents and defended against gas attacks in the trenches. Trained in hazardous environments and emergency medical response.

BackstoryDef.title: Sino-American War Sapper
BackstoryDef.description: Specialized in demolitions and mine-laying, clearing obstacles and sabotaging enemy fortifications. Courageous and skilled in explosives under fire.

BackstoryDef.title: Sino-American War Infantry
BackstoryDef.description: Served as a foot soldier in the People’s Liberation Army during the brutal Sino-American War. Fought in the frozen wastes of Alaska and the ruins of Shanghai, surviving on discipline and propaganda.

BackstoryDef.title: Sino-American War Officer
BackstoryDef.description: Led squads through the chaos of the Sino-American War, enforcing loyalty and discipline. Experienced in urban combat and countering American power armor assaults.

BackstoryDef.title: Chinese Stealth Trooper
BackstoryDef.description: Elite infiltrator equipped with prototype stealth suits, trained for sabotage and assassination behind enemy lines. Feared by American GIs and legendary in the propaganda reels.

BackstoryDef.title: Sino-American War Field Medic
BackstoryDef.description: Provided emergency care to wounded comrades in the trenches and bombed-out cities. Trained in battlefield medicine and chemical warfare survival.

BackstoryDef.title: Sino-American War Combat Engineer
BackstoryDef.description: Built fortifications and sabotaged enemy supply lines during the war. Specialized in explosives, field repairs, and tunnel warfare beneath the battlefields.

BackstoryDef.title: Sino-American War Military Police
BackstoryDef.description: Maintained order and discipline among troops, rooting out spies and enforcing martial law. Skilled in interrogation and close-quarters combat.

BackstoryDef.title: Sino-American War Scout
BackstoryDef.description: Operated ahead of the main force, gathering intelligence on American troop movements and power armor deployments. Trained in stealth, navigation, and survival in hostile territory.

BackstoryDef.title: Sino-American War Radio Operator
BackstoryDef.description: Kept units connected during the chaos of battle, relaying orders and calling for artillery strikes. Skilled in encryption and countering American electronic warfare.

BackstoryDef.title: Sino-American War Conscriptee
BackstoryDef.description: Drafted into the PLA as the war escalated, given basic training before being sent to the front. Experience marked by propaganda, fear, and the struggle to survive the American advance.

BackstoryDef.title: Sino-American War Tank Crew
BackstoryDef.description: Operated and maintained tanks in the PLA armored divisions, facing American Vertibirds and power armor on the battlefield. Skilled in teamwork, mechanics, and armored warfare.

BackstoryDef.title: Kitchen Helper
BackstoryDef.description: Assisted family members in preparing meals during rationing, learning basic cooking and the importance of sharing. Developed patience and a sense of responsibility.

BackstoryDef.title: Propaganda Poster Artist
BackstoryDef.description: Drew patriotic posters for school contests, inspired by Party slogans and war heroes. Developed artistic skill and a sense of national pride.

BackstoryDef.title: Young Radio Listener
BackstoryDef.description: Spent evenings listening to state broadcasts and war news with family. Learned to follow current events and discuss them with friends.

BackstoryDef.title: Air Raid Drill Leader
BackstoryDef.description: Helped organize air raid drills at school, guiding classmates to shelters and keeping spirits high. Developed leadership and crisis management skills.

BackstoryDef.title: Market Runner
BackstoryDef.description: Ran errands for family and neighbors in the busy city market, learning to navigate crowds and barter for supplies. Developed resourcefulness and people skills.

BackstoryDef.title: Rooftop Farmer
BackstoryDef.description: Helped grow beans and greens on the rooftop garden, learning about plants and teamwork. Developed patience and a love for fresh food.

BackstoryDef.title: Red Star Young Pioneer
BackstoryDef.description: Joined the Young Pioneers, learning Party songs, marching in parades, and practicing air raid drills. Developed discipline and pride in serving the Republic.

BackstoryDef.title: City Schoolchild
BackstoryDef.description: Attended crowded city schools, memorizing Party slogans and practicing duck-and-cover drills. Quick to learn and eager to please teachers.

BackstoryDef.title: Rooftop Gardener
BackstoryDef.description: Helped parents tend rooftop vegetable gardens, learning patience and the basics of growing food in the city. Developed a green thumb and a love for nature.

BackstoryDef.title: Street Performer
BackstoryDef.description: Learned to sing and dance for coins in busy city squares, entertaining neighbors and soldiers. Developed confidence and a flair for the dramatic.

BackstoryDef.title: Market Helper
BackstoryDef.description: Spent weekends helping family sell food at the local market, learning to count change and greet customers. Developed a strong work ethic and people skills.

BackstoryDef.title: Mechanic's Apprentice
BackstoryDef.description: Helped fix bicycles and scooters in the family shop, learning the basics of tools and repairs. Developed curiosity and practical skills.

BackstoryDef.title: Bookstore Reader
BackstoryDef.description: Spent afternoons in the local bookstore, reading adventure stories and Party pamphlets. Developed a love for learning and imagination.

BackstoryDef.title: Textile Helper
BackstoryDef.description: Assisted family members in sewing uniforms and blankets, learning patience and the basics of handiwork. Developed creativity and teamwork.

BackstoryDef.title: Museum Explorer
BackstoryDef.description: Visited the city museum with family, fascinated by ancient artifacts and war exhibits. Developed curiosity and a love for history.

BackstoryDef.title: Apartment Helper
BackstoryDef.description: Helped neighbors with chores in the communal housing block, learning cooperation and responsibility. Developed practical skills and a sense of community.
